title: Cyberbullying
description: Repeated hurtful messages, exclusion, or rumor spread.
steps: Escalate to school/work admin if needed.

title: Online Harassment
description: Threats, abusive DMs, or targeted intimidation.
steps: Do not respond to provoking messages.
Consider legal complaint if threats persist.
Seek counselor support for emotional safety.

title: Stalking / Doxxing
description: Personal details leaked, followed, or threatened online.
steps: Move to private/safe mode on all profiles.
Change critical credentials and phone privacy.

title: Sextortion / Impersonation
description: Blackmail or fake profile causing fear and shame.
steps: Do not pay or negotiate under pressure.
Save chats, payment asks, and account details.
Track emotional impact daily for one week.
Connect with counselor if panic remains high.

title: Phishing Distress
description: Fraudulent links or messages causing panic/loss risk.

title: Online Fraud Trauma
description: Financial scam aftermath with stress and distrust.
steps: Report to bank and national cyber helpline.
Preserve transaction IDs and chat logs.
Seek emotional support if shame persists.
